name: avoid-cloud-cost--skill
title: Design-for-Cost (FinOps) Evaluator
description: Evidence-based FinOps / cloud-cost-optimisation review of each opted-in repository (gated by `skill-config/avoid-cloud-cost-config.yaml` — a `skill-config/` folder at the repo root). The review criteria are split into one Markdown prompt per topic under `prompts/` (`FINOPS-00-Shared-Context.md` plus the 20 cost topics `FINOPS-01`…`FINOPS-20`, covering repository structure, config, compute, observability, resource lifecycle, storage, database, network, Kubernetes, scalability, cloud consumption, and architectural anti-patterns); the per-repo config's `prompts:` map supplies per-topic `additional_context` + `inputs` (keyed by prompt filename) that the evaluator treats as authoritative repo facts. Each topic is graded 1–5 on the canonical `FINOPS-00` rubric; the root-level `Cost-Avoidance-Scorecard.md` gathers every graded topic equal-weight into a single Cost Avoidance Score (1–5, 5 = leanest) mapped to the maturity bands. Produces TWO side-by-side artefacts per repo: a fully self-contained HTML report (`design_for_cost.html`, the bundled stylesheet embedded inline, system fonts only, no images, no embedded fonts) AND a machine-readable `design_for_cost.json` with the same findings, per-prompt scorecard, the unified Cost Avoidance Score, and citations. The palette excludes pure black (`#000000`) and any purple / violet hue. Every finding cites a `file:line` in the repo; topics without evidence are explicitly marked Not Evident.
author: sdubeyslb

commands.name: scan-repos
commands.title: Scan for opted-in repos
commands.description: Scans the current working directory for repositories, parses each `skill-config/avoid-cloud-cost-config.yaml`, and emits deterministic JSON with `included[]` vs `excluded[]` lists. Repos without the config file (or whose `skill-config/` folder is missing) are excluded.

commands.name: list-prompts
commands.title: List the per-topic prompts
commands.description: Lists the `prompts/FINOPS-*.md` files (FINOPS-00 shared context plus the 20 cost topics FINOPS-01…FINOPS-20) as JSON.

commands.name: read-prompts
commands.title: Print the authoritative FinOps prompts
commands.description: Prints every `prompts/FINOPS-*.md` concatenated in order, appending each topic's `additional_context` + `inputs` from the target repo's `skill-config/avoid-cloud-cost-config.yaml`. Pass `--repo=<path>` to target a specific repo root.

commands.name: read-config
commands.title: Inspect the resolved per-repo config
commands.description: Reads the target repo's `skill-config/avoid-cloud-cost-config.yaml` and emits JSON with the resolved displayName, displayNameSource, and per-prompt config entries.

commands.name: read-style-css
commands.title: Print the bundled stylesheet
commands.description: Prints the skill's bundled `assets/style.css` to stdout for inline embedding in the HTML report.

commands.name: setup
commands.title: Scaffold output directory
commands.description: Creates `outcome/design_for_cost/[<repo>/]` in the current project. Removes any stray `.css` / `.md` / font / image files or legacy `.scan-*.json` evidence inventories left behind by older skill versions so the output contract (HTML + JSON only) stays clean.

commands.name: validate
commands.title: Validate output directory
commands.description: Checks that `outcome/design_for_cost/[<repo>/]` exists and contains only `.html` + `.json` files.

commands.name: report
commands.title: Generate inventory report
commands.description: Inventories the `.html` / `.json` files in `outcome/design_for_cost/[<repo>/]` and writes a JSON inventory report; flags any stray files.
